title: Problems when using right join and Field functions simultaneously
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE t2 (c1 INT, c2 VARCHAR, c3 DATE, c4 BLOB);
INSERT INTO t2 (c1, c2, c3) VALUES (1, 'test', DATE '2023-01-01');
UPDATE t2 SET c4 = CAST('example blob data' AS BLOB) WHERE c1 = 1;
SELECT t1.c0, t2.c2 FROM t1 RIGHT JOIN t2 ON t1.c0 = t2.c1 WHERE (t2.c2 IN ('test', NULL, 'example'));
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM t2 WHERE c3 IS NULL OR c4 IS NOT NULL;
key_bug_features: Right join with FIELD function on NULL values
